ABOUT FLOREA RESORT

Luxury. Nature. Comfort.

Nestled near Nagaon Beach, Alibag, Florea Resort offers an extraordinary blend of luxury, comfort and tropical serenity. From premium accommodations and a stunning swimming pool to conference facilities and family entertainment, every experience is designed to create unforgettable memories.
